name: api-docs
description: Your API works but nobody can figure out how to use it because the docs are either missing or auto-generated garbage. Point this at your codebase and get back clean, developer-friendly documentation with examples, error handling guides, and quickstart tutorials.
tagline: API docs developers actually want to read

skills.name: generate-docs
skills.description: Generate comprehensive API documentation from your codebase

setupTime: Instant — just point it at your codebase
outputDescription: Complete API documentation with quickstart guide, authentication docs, full endpoint reference with curl/JS/Python examples, error handling guide, and rate limit info.
